CONTENT.Honours: Jong AjaxEerste Divisie: 2017–18AjaxEredivisie: 2018–19KNVB Cup: 2018–19IndividualUEFA European Under-21 Championship Team of the Tournament: 2021
CONTENT.Club career: De Wit made his professional debut in the Eerste Divisie for Jong Ajax on 3 February 2017 in a game against RKC Waalwijk. On 25 February 2018, he made his debut in the senior squad in a 0–0 Eredivisie draw against ADO Den Haag. On 22 August 2018, he made his European debut in a 3–1 Champions League play-off win against Dynamo Kyiv.On 30 August 2019, De Wit signed a contract with AZ Alkmaar who reportedly paid a €2 million transfer fee to Ajax.On 3 July 2024, De Wit signed a four-year contract with VfL Bochum as a free agent.

SUMMARY: Dani de Wit (born 28 January 1998) is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for German Bundesliga club VfL Bochum.
